description: spec/execution-model.md's snapshot rule: effect-event payloads MUST preserve alias/cycle topology via snapshot-local reference identity, terminating via a whole-capture memo. `add :l to :l` (spec/data-structures.md's `add` semantics) makes `:l` a genuinely self-referential list; the `print :l` payload must capture that cycle rather than crashing (host stack overflow) or silently truncating it. `$id`/`$ref` assert that the third element IS the very same reference as the outer list itself. Issue #495, PR #530.
